title: teams — PHP attribute contracts
description: Three class-level attributes for listener discovery. No property-level attributes: the four owned rows (Team, TeamMember, TeamTrial, EventTeam) use ordinary Eloquent + spatie/laravel-data class attributes shipped by foundation. `#[AsTeamListener]` subscribes to team-catalogue events (create / archive / pause / resume / schedule / coach / registration). `#[AsTeamMemberListener]` subscribes to roster-lifecycle events (join / leave / role / status / jersey / injury / suspension). `#[AsTrialListener]` subscribes to trial-workflow events (scheduled / started / completed / converted / rejected / no-show / cancelled). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events.

attributes.name: AsTeamListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to team-catalogue lifecycle events (TeamCreated / TeamUpdated / TeamStatusChanged / TeamCapacityChanged / TeamScheduleChanged / TeamCoachChanged / TeamRegistrationOpened / TeamRegistrationClosed / TeamArchived / TeamRestored / TeamDeleted).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`TeamCreated`, `TeamArchived`, `TeamCoachChanged`, …). Empty = subscribe to every `Stackra\Teams\Events\Team*` event. Names resolve against events.json at boot; typos abort boot with a discovery error.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (see events.json). Use to route cascades / notifications onto dedicated queues.

params.name: priority
params.description: Handler ordering within a single event. Lower runs first. Cascade listeners (CascadeMembersOnTeamArchived) declare priority 50 so they run before notification listeners.

attributes.name: AsTeamMemberListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to roster-lifecycle events (TeamMemberJoined / TeamMemberLeft / TeamMemberRoleChanged / TeamMemberStatusChanged / TeamMemberJerseyChanged / TeamMemberPositionChanged / TeamMemberSuspended / TeamMemberInjured).

attributes.name: AsTrialListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to Trial + EventTeam lifecycle events (TrialScheduled / TrialStarted / TrialCompleted / TrialConvertedToMember / TrialRejected / TrialNoShow / TrialCancelled / EventTeamRegistered / EventTeamWithdrew / EventTeamCheckedIn / EventTeamResultRecorded). The two entity families share this attribute because most bridging consumers (Finance for trial fees, Notifications for reminders) care about the union.

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to every `Stackra\Teams\Events\Trial*` AND `Stackra\Teams\Events\EventTeam*` event.
